texto: All you have to do is revise your point of view. Instead of trying to achieve perfection, simply relax and enjoy human imperfectability. With that perspective you achieve the ultimate godhead. You see man as infinite possibility always in the process of becoming. You see finally that man, in emulating the creative process, is nothing less than God.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Robert H. Rimmer sobre temas ligados a sucesso. A afirmação “All you have to do is revise your point of view. Instead of trying to achieve perfection, simply …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a sucesso, mendes-east, unconditional-love, útil em momentos de termino e unconditional-love.
